tools.name: chatgpt_import
tools.description: Import ChatGPT conversation history from an exported conversations.json file or ZIP archive. Use dry_run first to preview what will be imported, then run again without dry_run to perform the import.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the conversations.json file or ChatGPT export ZIP file

dry_run.description: If true, only preview what would be imported without actually importing. Defaults to false.
